glosses.ja: マイク; マイクロホン

sentences.target: Tu prends le micro, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ lə mikʁo sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu prends le micro, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ lə mikʁo sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you take the mic, please?
translations.ja: マイクを受け取ってください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; informal familiar address.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular; main transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the noun 'micro'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'prends'.
Elision/contracted form of 'si' + 'il'; introduces the subordinate in the fixed polite formula 's'il te plaît'.
2nd-person singular clitic indirect object pronoun; complements 'plaît' in the formula.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; verb of the subordinate clause in 's'il te plaît'.

sentences.target: Le micro de la salle grésille encore.
sentences.reading: /lə mikʁo də la sal ɡʁezij ɑ̃kɔʁ/

translations.fr: Le micro de la salle grésille encore.
translations.ipa: /lə mikʁo də la sal ɡʁezij ɑ̃kɔʁ/
translations.en: The room’s mic is still crackling.
translations.es: El micrófono de la sala todavía chisporrotea.
translations.de: Das Mikrofon im Raum knistert immer noch.
translations.it: Il microfono della sala scoppietta ancora.
translations.zh-Hans: 会场的麦克风还在滋滋作响。
translations.yue: 場內個咪仲喺度劈啪作響。
translations.ru: Микрофон в зале всё ещё потрескивает.
translations.pt: O microfone da sala ainda está chiando.
translations.vi: Micro trong phòng vẫn bị rè.
translations.ar: ميكروفون القاعة لا يزال يصدر طقطقة.
translations.nl: De microfoon in de zaal kraakt nog steeds.
translations.hu: A terem mikrofonja még mindig recseg.
translations.hi: हॉल का माइक्रोफोन अभी भी शोर कर रहा है.
translations.el: Το μικρόφωνο της αίθουσας εξακολουθεί να τρίζει.
translations.ja: 会場のマイクはまだパチパチ鳴っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'micro'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase and subject of 'grésille'.
Preposition introducing a genitival/possessive complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'salle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'de' in 'de la salle'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate describing sound.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates continuation.

sentences.target: Je vais brancher le micro sur l'ordi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vɛ bʁɑ̃ʃe lə mikʁo syʁ lɔʁdi/

translations.fr: Je vais brancher le micro sur l'ordi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vɛ bʁɑ̃ʃe lə mikʁo syʁ lɔʁdi/
translations.en: I’m going to plug the mic into the computer.
translations.es: Voy a conectar el micrófono al ordenador.
translations.de: Ich werde das Mikro an den Computer anschließen.
translations.it: Sto per collegare il microfono al computer.
translations.zh-Hans: 我要把麦克风接到电脑上。
translations.yue: 我會將個咪接到部電腦上。
translations.ru: Я собираюсь подключить микрофон к компьютеру.
translations.pt: Vou conectar o microfone ao computador.
translations.he: אני עומד לחבר את המיקרופון למחשב.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ cắm micro vào máy tính.
translations.nl: Ik ga de microfoon op de computer aansluiten.
translations.uk: Я збираюся підключити мікрофон до комп’ютера.
translations.hu: A mikrofont a számítógéphez fogom csatlakoztatni.
translations.hi: मैं माइक्रोफोन को कंप्यूटर से जोड़ने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πρόκειται να συνδέσω το μικρόφωνο στον υπολογιστή.
translations.nb: Jeg skal koble mikrofonen til PC-en.
translations.id: Saya akan menyambungkan mikrofon ke komputer.
translations.sv: Jag ska koppla in mikrofonen i datorn.
translations.ro: O să conectez microfonul la computer.
translations.cs: Chystám se zapojit mikrofon do počítače.
translations.da: Jeg vil tilslutte mikrofonen til computeren.
translations.ja: マイクをパソコンに接続します。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; auxiliary in the near-future construction (aller + infinitive).
Infinitive verb; complement of 'vais' in futur proche.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'micro'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'brancher'.
Preposition indicating location/target surface.
Colloquial noun ('ordi' = abbr. of 'ordinateur') with elided definite article 'l''; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: On coupe le micro pendant la pause.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kup lə mikʁo pɑ̃dɑ̃ la poz/

translations.fr: On coupe le micro pendant la pause.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kup lə mikʁo pɑ̃dɑ̃ la poz/
translations.en: We’re muting the mic during the break.
translations.es: Vamos a silenciar el micrófono durante la pausa.
translations.de: Wir schalten das Mikro während der Pause stumm.
translations.it: Mettiamo il microfono in muto durante la pausa.
translations.zh-Hans: 休息期间我们把麦克风静音。
translations.yue: 中場休息嘅時候我哋會將個咪靜音。
translations.ru: Во время перерыва мы отключаем микрофон.
translations.pt: Nós vamos silenciar o microfone durante o intervalo.
translations.he: אנחנו משתיקים את המיקרופון בזמן ההפסקה.
translations.vi: Trong giờ nghỉ chúng tôi sẽ tắt tiếng micro.
translations.nl: Tijdens de pauze zetten we de microfoon op stil.
translations.uk: Під час перерви ми вимикаємо мікрофон.
translations.hu: A szünet alatt lenémítjuk a mikrofont.
translations.hi: विराम के दौरान हम माइक्रोफोन को म्यूट करेंगे.
translations.el: Κατά τη διάρκεια του διαλείμματος βάζουμε το μικρόφωνο σε σίγαση.
translations.sv: Under pausen stänger vi av ljudet i mikrofonen.
translations.ro: În pauză punem microfonul pe mut.
translations.da: Under pausen slår vi lyden fra på mikrofonen.
translations.ja: 休憩中はマイクをミュートにします。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; grammatically 3rd person singular.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main transitive verb.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'micro'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'coupe'.
Preposition marking a temporal interval.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pause'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'pendant'.
